frameworks.name: subjective value computation under uncertainty
frameworks.one_line: arousal modulates the mapping from value to choice differently for risk versus ambiguity

frameworks.name: risk-ambiguity decomposition of uncertainty
frameworks.one_line: uncertainty is fractionated into known (risk) and unknown (ambiguity) probabilities

frameworks.name: somatic marker / arousal account of decision-making
frameworks.one_line: skin conductance indexes sympathetic arousal shaping economic choice

frameworks.name: economic choice modeling
frameworks.one_line: parametric estimation of risk and ambiguity sensitivity from gambling choices

core_question: Does physiological arousal influence choice under risk and ambiguity in the same way?
key_assumptions: risk and ambiguity are dissociable forms of uncertainty
skin conductance response reflects sympathetic arousal during choice
subjective value and uncertainty sensitivity can be estimated from gambling behavior
manipulations: type of uncertainty (risk vs ambiguity) in lottery choices
key_findings: arousal tracks subjective lottery value regardless of uncertainty type
enhanced arousal decreases risk-taking under high risk
enhanced arousal increases risk-taking under ambiguity
arousal effect on choice persists after controlling for subjective value
interpretations: arousal contributes differentially to value-to-choice computation across uncertainty types
asymmetric arousal effects may explain heightened aversion to ambiguity
